message:
refactor: migrate mux-server and client crates from smol to asupersync runtime

Replace smol::channel, smol::future::or, smol::prelude, and Async<T>
wrappers with asupersync equivalents (async-channel, futures::select,
hand-rolled AsyncRead/AsyncWrite via IoRegistration).

The SshStream type now implements poll-based non-blocking IO directly
instead of relying on smol's Async wrapper, with WouldBlock -> Pending
translation and fallback timer-based rewake when no IO driver is
available. The mux dispatch loop uses pin_mut + select instead of
smol::future::or for racing channel messages against stream readability.

Adds tests: EOF-as-clean-disconnect (dispatch), SshStream async
roundtrip with initial WouldBlock (client).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3512,6 +3512,8 @@ name = "frankenterm-mux-server-impl"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
+ "asupersync",
+ "async-channel",
  "async_ossl",
  "codec",
  "config",
@@ -3529,7 +3531,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "promise",
  "rangeset",
  "rcgen",
- "smol",
  "termwiz 0.24.0",
  "url",
  "wezterm-client",
@@ -11439,7 +11440,8 @@ name = "wezterm-client"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
- "async-io",
+ "asupersync",
+ "async-channel",
  "async-trait",
  "async_ossl",
  "codec",
@@ -11462,7 +11464,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "promise",
  "rangeset",
  "ratelim",
- "smol",
  "termwiz 0.24.0",
  "textwrap",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",

@@ -11,8 +11,10 @@ publish = false
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
+async-channel.workspace = true
+asupersync.workspace = true
 async_ossl = { workspace = true, default-features = false, features = ["async-asupersync"] }
-codec = { workspace = true, default-features = false, features = ["async-smol"] }
+codec = { workspace = true, default-features = false, features = ["async-asupersync"] }
 config.workspace = true
 dns-lookup.workspace = true
 futures.workspace = true
@@ -26,7 +28,6 @@ parking_lot.workspace = true
 promise.workspace = true
 rangeset.workspace = true
 rcgen.workspace = true
-smol.workspace = true
 termwiz = { workspace=true, features=["use_serde"] }
 url.workspace = true
 wezterm-client.workspace = true

@@ -9,10 +9,11 @@ publish = false
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
-async-io.workspace = true
+async-channel.workspace = true
 async-trait.workspace = true
+asupersync.workspace = true
 async_ossl = { workspace = true, default-features = false, features = ["async-asupersync"] }
-codec = { workspace = true, default-features = false, features = ["async-smol"] }
+codec = { workspace = true, default-features = false, features = ["async-asupersync"] }
 config.workspace = true
 filedescriptor.workspace = true
 futures.workspace = true
@@ -28,7 +29,6 @@ portable-pty = { workspace=true, features = ["serde_support"]}
 promise.workspace = true
 rangeset.workspace = true
 ratelim.workspace = true
-smol.workspace = true
 termwiz.workspace = true
 textwrap.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
